description.zh-cn: 智能推荐：记录浏览足迹，提供「猜你喜欢/看了又看/买了又买/最近浏览」多坑位推荐 API。看了又看基于浏览共现、买了又买基于订单共现，并以销量热销兜底，个性化「猜你喜欢」按近期浏览品类聚合，前台直接调用。
description.en: Smart recommendations: track browsing footprints and expose multi-slot APIs (for-you / viewed-also-viewed / bought-together / recently-viewed). Co-view and co-purchase based ranking with best-seller fallback, plus category-aware personalization.
